top_signals.title: Asia-Pacific markets set to open lower on renewed Middle East tensions
top_signals.summary: Asia-Pacific markets were set to open lower amid renewed tensions between Iran and the U.S. and worries that the conflict may keep inflation elevated.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran hits Kuwait, U.S. strikes near Hormuz in Gulf flare-up
top_signals.summary: Iranian attacks damaged Kuwait's airport and injured dozens while the U.S. military carried out strikes near the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: What to Know About the SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is poised to have the largest stock-market debut in history when it goes public later in June. SpaceX is aiming to raise $75 billion in the initial public offering, more than twice the previous record holder.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Iraq to Boost Ceyhan Oil Exports as Hormuz Strait Remains Shut - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Iraq to Boost Ceyhan Oil Exports as Hormuz Strait Remains Shut  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ukrainian drones hit Saint Petersburg as ’Russian Davos’ opens
top_signals.summary: Some 20,000 people from 130 countries were to attend the three-day annual Saint Petersburg International Economic Forum (SPIEF).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
